Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 371 [Extract of a blessing for the city of Assur, a blessing for the king and explanatory comments][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

I₃-MEŠ ⸢ina gul?-gu⸣-le?-⸢e lu tab⸣-[ku]

(o 1) May oil be poured out from skull-shaped vessels.

o 22

⸢SIG₂⸣-ME x x x [(...)] TI PA A AŠ₂ x [...]

(o 2) [...] wool ... [...].

o 33

⸢a⸣-kal pi-⸢ka⸣ [...] ⸢KAŠ⸣-MEŠ ṭuḫ-⸢du⸣

(o 3) The bread from your mouth [...], the beer is plenty.

o 44

[ina] lib₃-bi-šu-nu ⸢i?-sa-ar₂?-tu₂?⸣ sa-⸢di⸣-[ra]

(o 4) Arrange prosperity among them!

o 55

[KUR].⸢KUR⸣-ME ⸢i⸣-ri-ša₂ ina!(U₂) iri⸢ŠA₃⸣—IRI

(o 5) The lands rejoiced in the Inner City and the Inner City is the gate of saving.

o 66

⸢u₂⸣ iri⸢ŠA₃⸣—IRI KA₂? ga-ma-lu

o 77

aš+šur d[BAD] ⸢gi⸣-nu-u ⸢MIN⸣<(gi-nu-u)> ⸢sa-li?-mu?-ku⸣-nu

(o 7) Aššur (and) Ellil - regular contributions, ditto (regular contributions) are your reconciliation.

o 88

ŠU ⸢ra⸣-[...] x-tu₂-u pa-ṭi₂-⸢ir?-a?⸣

(o 8) Release the hand of ... [...] ...; the weak one is drawn into the breath of the gods; ... the harvest [...].

o 99

en-⸢šu⸣ [ša]-ad-da a-na TU₁₅ DINGIR-MEŠ ⸢BURU₁₄⸣ [...] x x x

o 1010

GU.ZA [LUGAL?ti?]-⸢ka⸣ qur?-⸢di⸣-ka ⸢lu⸣-u dan NI NI? x [...] x

(o 10) May the throne of your [kingship], your warriorhood, be strong ... [...] ....

o 1111

i-ši-[id] ⸢GU⸣.ZA-ka lu-u GINin d[...] dx x [...]

(o 11) May the foundations of your throne be legitimate! ... [...] ... [...]

o 1212

⸢ina⸣ x [...]-ka lu-u GIŠ? x x x x x ⸢KA NI⸣ [...]  ; ki-⸢de⸣-e-nu

(o 12) May ... in your ... [...] ... [...] protection.

o 1313

ba-⸢ʾu?⸣-lu kab-tu₂ da-nu₃ an-⸢tu₄⸣ e-bu-⸢te⸣

(o 13) Great (means) important; Anu, Antu, the pure ones.

o 1414

d⸢aš+šur? AD?⸣-ka : d⸢NIN⸣.LIL₂ ⸢AMA⸣-ka

(o 14) Aššur is your father : Mullissu is your mother.

o 1515

dGU.⸢LA⸣ : A.ZUtu₂ x x u x ⸢AN?⸣ x mu-ši ⸢KAK⸣ KI x [(...)]

(o 15) Gula (means) : medical skill ... and ... night ....

o 1616

AD x :? GU UB U KAD₂ da-nu₃ NU

(o 16) ... Anu ....

o 1717

ṣi-li : ga-⸢ba-re⸣-e ša me-ši-ri

(o 17) Protections (mean) : the equivalent of justice.

o 1818

ṣi-li : ⸢AN⸣ x [...] x-⸢zu⸣-ka

(o 18) Protections (mean) : ... [...] ...

o 1919

ṣu-mur : [...] ⸢ṣu⸣-mur la i-ka-⸢ša₂-du⸣

(o 19) Desire (means) : they do not achieve [...] desire.

Reverse
r 1r 1

I ŠU? ina ṢI* [...] ša₂ x1

(r 1) (Too broken for translation)

r 22

I* x* IGI* x* [...] x

r 33

x* x* x* [...]

r 44

U₂* ⸢DA*?⸣ [...] x x

r 55

NUN* x* ḪI*? [...]

r 66

TAG* ḪAR* [...]

r 77

x* [...]

r 88

ša₂ ⸢u₂⸣-[...]

r 99

ša₂ ⸢u₂⸣-[...]

r 1010

RU TA [...]

1The original excavation photo of SU 51/188 shows some more signs than drawn on Gurney's copy.
